title: The Sky Darkens
description: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
scene: Across pages 19, 20, 21, 22, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Alright, mateys! Just follow my lead!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: It's time to swim, Usopp Gallery Pirates!

summary: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
